html:
Exclusive to:

The Lazy Deserter is a Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It is found in the Magic Filter and Structures Filter, and requires a Desert Stone, an Orange Moonlens and three Cut Stone to craft. Its rare Blueprint can be obtained by giving a Beach Toy Trinket to the Antlion, by killing the Antlion, or as a random drop from a Loot Stash, after killing Klaus. The Lazy Deserter's main use is to teleport one player to another when both are connected by using two of them.

In order to teleport, one player must first activate the Deserter from the destination side. This will initially take 15 , then lock the player in place and generate a constant drain of 40 /min. The second person, right after, must either activate the Deserter on the other side, or right-click on a Desert Stone in their inventory. This will make this player teleport to the first player that started channeling.

When channeling a Lazy Deserter, any nearby Desert Stones will levitate and have their "Spikes" jut out.

Teleporting will take 50 , just like using the Telelocator Staff. If the Desert Stone was used, it will get consumed in the process.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Assets
  • 5 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Reliquary Collection
Recondite Deserter
Be drawn together by the mysteries of the desert.

Tips

  • Aside from teleporting, the Lazy Deserter can be used to rapidly lower the player's sanity at no cost. This makes it very useful for farming Nightmare Creatures for their valuable Nightmare Fuel.
    • It is especially useful for Maxwell as with his constant sanity regeneration combined with his large nightmare fuel consumption, he does not generally go insane naturally. The Lazy Deserter gives him a no-cost way to reduce his sanity, and while worm holes accomplish the same thing, worm holes take longer to use and cannot be moved.
  • In a similar manner, the above method can be used on Lunar Island to keep the player's Enlightenment low.
  • The Lazy Deserter works well when combined with Wanda's Backtrek Watch. A Wanda player can teleport to one of their waypoints then use a Lazy Deserter to teleport other players to the same location. This allows multi-person teleportation to various locations without using up any Purple Gems.

Trivia

  • The Lazy Deserter was introduced in the Against the Grain update.
  • The teleporting effect is called "townportalsandcoffin_fx" in the game's code.

Assets

The Lazy DeserterRecondite Deserter

Gallery

  • The Lazy Deserter as seen in the poster for the Against the Grain update.

The second person, right after, must either activate the Deserter on the other side, or right-click on a Desert Stone in their inventory. Aside from teleporting, the Lazy Deserter can be used to rapidly lower the player's sanity at no cost. This makes it very useful for farming Nightmare Creatures for their valuable Nightmare Fuel.
It is especially useful for Maxwell as with his constant sanity regeneration combined with his large nightmare fuel consumption, he does not generally go insane naturally. In a similar manner, the above method can be used on Lunar Island to keep the player's Enlightenment low.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Kẻ đào ngũ lười biếng là một Cấu trúc độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong A New Reign. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ Lọc Ma Thuật và Bộ Lọc Cấu Trúc, và cần một Đá Sa Mạc, một Thấu Kính Mặt Trăng Màu Cam và ba Đá Cắt để chế tạo. Bản Kế hoạch quý hiếm của nó có thể nhận được bằng cách tặng Đồ chơi Bãi biển cho Kiến Sư tử, bằng cách giết Kiến Sư tử, hoặc dưới dạng rơi ngẫu nhiên từ Kho Chiến lợi phẩm, sau khi giết Klaus. Công dụng chính của Lazy Deserter là dịch chuyển người chơi này sang người chơi khác khi cả hai được kết nối bằng cách sử dụng hai người trong số họ.
title: The Lazy Deserter

{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}} {{Object Infobox |tool = Can be [[Tools#Hammering Tools|Hammered]] {{pic|32|Hammer}} |image = The Lazy Deserter Build.png |icon=The Lazy Deserter.png |spawnCode = "townportal" |ingredient1 = Desert Stone |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Orange Moonlens |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Cut Stone |multiplier3 = 3 |filter = {{Pic32|Magic Filter}} {{Pic32|Structures Filter}} |tier = 11 |objectSanity = -15 on use, -50/min |perk = Quick travel between players. |description = Gather your friends with sand power.}} {{Quotes |wilson = This pyramid controls the sands. |willow = Magic stuff. |wolfgang = Is friend-bringer! |wendy = For when I don't want to be alone... |wx78 = THE MINION SUMMONER |wickerbottom = It deconstructs the subject and reconstitutes them elsewhere. |woodie = Some sort of sandy transportation. |maxwell = Walking gets tiresome, you know. |wigfrid = Tö save my allies the jöurney. |webber = Floaty and weird. |winona = It runs on "magic" instead of electricity. |warly = Is someone coming for dinner? |wortox = Soul delivery machine. |wormwood = Friend poofer |wurt = Take me where friends are! |walter = Ready for a journey into the unknown Woby? |wanda = A bit redundant, but it'll work in a pinch. |choose = wickerbottom}} '''The Lazy Deserter''' is a [[Structure]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[A New Reign]]''. It is found in the [[Magic Filter]] and [[Structures Filter]], and requires a [[Desert Stone]], an [[Moonlens|Orange Moonlens]] and three [[Cut Stone]] to craft. Its rare [[Blueprint]] can be obtained by giving a [[Trinkets#Beach Toy|Beach Toy]] Trinket to the [[Antlion]], by killing the Antlion, or as a random drop from a [[Loot Stash]], after killing [[Klaus]]. The Lazy Deserter's main use is to teleport one player to another when both are connected by using two of them. In order to teleport, one player must first activate the Deserter from the destination side. This will initially take 15 {{Sanity}}, then lock the player in place and generate a constant drain of 40 {{Sanity}}/min. The second person, right after, must either activate the Deserter on the other side, or right-click on a Desert Stone in their inventory. This will make this player teleport to the first player that started channeling. When channeling a Lazy Deserter, any nearby Desert Stones will levitate and have their "Spikes" jut out. Teleporting will take 50 {{Sanity}}, just like using the [[Telelocator Staff]]. If the Desert Stone was used, it will get consumed in the process. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Structure Skins|Belongings}}
{{SkinInfo |image = Recondite Deserter Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |collection = Reliquary Collection |name = Recondite Deserter |description = Be drawn together by the mysteries of the desert. }}
=={{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips== *Aside from teleporting, the Lazy Deserter can be used to rapidly lower the player's sanity at no cost. This makes it very useful for farming Nightmare Creatures for their valuable [[Nightmare Fuel]]. **It is especially useful for Maxwell as with his constant sanity regeneration combined with his large nightmare fuel consumption, he does not generally go insane naturally. The Lazy Deserter gives him a no-cost way to reduce his sanity, and while worm holes accomplish the same thing, worm holes take longer to use and cannot be moved. *In a similar manner, the above method can be used on [[Lunar Island]] to keep the player's [[Enlightenment]] low. *The Lazy Deserter works well when combined with [[Wanda]]'s [[Backtrek Watch]]. A Wanda player can teleport to one of their waypoints then use a Lazy Deserter to teleport other players to the same location. This allows multi-person teleportation to various locations without using up any Purple Gems. == {{Pic|32|Placeholder|Placeholder}} Trivia== * The Lazy Deserter was introduced in the ''[[A New Reign#February 2, 2017 - Against the Grain|Against the Grain]]'' update. * The teleporting effect is called "townportalsandcoffin_fx" in the game's code. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == The Lazy Deserter= The Lazy Deserter Build.png|Idle The Lazy Deserter Idle.gif|Idle The Lazy Deserter On Idle.gif|Idle on The Lazy Deserter Off Hit.gif|Off hit The Lazy Deserter On Hit.gif|On hit The Lazy Deserter Place.gif|Being placed |-| Recondite Deserter= Recondite Deserter Build.png|Idle Recondite Deserter Idle.gif|Idle Recondite Deserter On Idle.gif|Idle on Recondite Deserter Off Hit.gif|Off hit Recondite Deserter On Hit.gif|On hit Recondite Deserter Place.gif|Being placed == {{pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == DST Update Against the Grain.png|The Lazy Deserter as seen in the poster for the ''[[A New Reign#February 2, 2017 - Against the Grain|Against the Grain]]'' update. {{Craftable Items|structure}} [[Category:A New Reign]] [[Category:Sanity Loss]] [[Category:Magic Filter]] [[Category:Structures Filter]] [[Category:Non-Flammable]]
